c.d: The speed at which the app can transfer files between devices.
c.s: App Store reviews, developer specifications, user testing

c.d: The availability of the app across different platforms (iOS, Android, Web, etc.).
The ease of use and intuitiveness of the app's interface.
The security measures implemented to protect file transfers.
The maximum file size that can be transferred using the app.
Any extra features that enhance the file transfer process, such as cloud storage integration, chat, etc.
The average rating given by users on app stores.
